scenes.narration: 夜幕降临，古镇沉浸在连绵秋雨中
scenes.visual_desc: Wide establishing shot of an ancient Chinese town in autumn rain
scenes.np_prompt: Ancient Chinese town at night, rain falling on cobblestone streets, red lanterns glowing warmly along old wooden buildings, water puddles reflecting the lantern light, atmospheric fog, cinematic wide shot, @图像_苏小小
scenes.video_prompt: Camera slowly dollies forward through rain-soaked ancient Chinese town streets, red lanterns swaying

scenes.narration: 苏小小撑着油纸伞走在回家的路上
scenes.visual_desc: Medium tracking shot of a young girl with oil-paper umbrella
scenes.np_prompt: A 16-year-old Chinese girl @图像_苏小小 walking with an oil-paper umbrella in the rain, wearing a light blue cotton dress, bright expressive eyes, lantern-lit ancient street background
scenes.video_prompt: Camera tracks a young girl with an oil-paper umbrella walking through rain, her blue dress swaying

scenes.visual_desc: Dynamic handheld shot of bridge collapsing
scenes.np_prompt: Ancient stone bridge collapsing in heavy rain, two teenagers running away in panic, @图像_苏小小 @图像_林远, dramatic water splash, lightning flash illuminating the scene
scenes.video_prompt: Bridge violently shakes and collapses behind running teenagers, massive water splash, dramatic rain

visualDna: 中国古镇水墨风格 | 暖色灯笼冷色雨夜对比 | 电影化光影
